plan.caption:
Charizard from Skyridge is worth $5,250. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.shockHeadline: Worth more than|a used Honda Civic
brief.cardBody: Skyridge's crown jewel.|The card the whole set chases.
brief.craftBody: The wing membrane is rendered in layered amber and copper stippling | flame tips dissolve into the holographic substrate beneath
brief.sceneBody: A secret rare printed beyond the set's official count, centered on a cosmic starfield no other Charizard card has matched | the pose conveys raw altitude
brief.oddsBody: Rip a sealed booster and|the odds are 65 to 1.
